content:
2. Part 1 of the Tenth Schedule to the Federal Constitution is
amended by  substituting for paragraphs (a), (b), (c) and (d) of
subsection 1(1) the  following:
“(a) for the first 50,000 persons at the rate of RM60.00 per
person;
(b) for the next 500,000 persons at the rate of RM8.50 per
person;
(c) for the next 500,000 persons at the rate of RM9.00 per
person;
(d) for the remainder at the rate of RM9.50 per person,”.
